## What and why

<!-- One or two sentences: what this changes and the reason. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] One focused change (not a batch of unrelated work)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the behaviour change
- [ ] `npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test && npm run build` all pass locally
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or justified in `docs/DECISIONS.md`)
- [ ] No real malware in fixtures; benign pattern samples only
- [ ] Docs updated if a recorded fact, decision, or the structure changed
